title: Add a serve-with-shared-browser target to a project
description: Wire an nx:run-commands orchestrator that runs the project's own `serve` in parallel with the shared co-driven browser navigating to it (`nx run <project>:serve-with-shared-browser`). The per-app sibling of worktree-serve: applied by the house `app` generator to every app (first and later) and re-asserted by `scaffold.sh --repair`. Consumes the workspace-level `shared-browser` tooling. Idempotent.

project.description: Project to add the serve-with-shared-browser target to.
